headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report of the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: Tennessee Republicans pass map splitting up state’s lone majority-Black district
headlines.description: Tennessee’s Republican-led Legislature passed a new congressional map splitting up the state’s lone majority-Black district, swiftly responding to the U.S.

headlines.title: Marco Rubio meets with Pope Leo after Trump’s criticism over Iran war
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio discussed the Middle East with Pope Leo at the Vatican on Thursday, at an audience that follows President Donald Trump’s criticism of the first American pontiff over the Iran war.

headlines.title: Los Angeles Mayor Candidates Spar Over Wildfire Response
headlines.description: Incumbent Karen Bass clashed with former reality star Spencer Pratt and L.A. city council member Nithya Raman at a fiery debate for mayor of Los Angeles. The issues that gained the most attention in the debate were homelessness, immigration and the Palisades wildfires.

headlines.title: Marco Rubio Meets With Pope Leo XIV Over Iran War and Cuba
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting with Pope Leo XIV in the Apostolic Palace at the Vatican and the State Department says the conversations will include the situation in the Middle East and mutual interests in the Western Hemisphere. It comes after a series of tense exchanges between President Donald Trump and the pontiff over the Iran war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Iran Says Its Reviewing 14-Point US Proposal to End the War
headlines.description: An American fighter jet attacked an Iranian tanker in the Gulf of Oman as it tried to break through the U.S. military blockade and make its way to an Iranian port, according to the U.S. Central Command. It comes as Iran says it’s deliberating a response to what the Wall Street Journal describes as a one page, 14-point U.S. proposal to end the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY from Jerusalem.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Tracking the DOJ's effort to get U.S. voter registration data
headlines.description: The Justice Department is seeking voter registration list data from all 50 states and the District of Columbia over the past year.

headlines.title: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt gives birth to second child
headlines.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt announced Thursday that she has given birth to her second child.
